title: 'aphaq #0662
definition:
1) to hold, be strong, restrain, hold back
    1a) (Hithpael)
        1a1) to restrain oneself, refrain
        1a2) to force, compel oneself
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Hithpael)
        1a1) to restrain oneself, refrain
        1a2) to force, compel oneself

    NASB:  to hold, be strong
